chapter_title.ar: باب بَدْءِ الْأَذَانِ وَ الْإِقَامَةِ وَ فَضْلِهِمَا وَ ثَوَابِهِمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 18 – The Azān (Call to the Salāt), and the Iqamah (Call to the establishment of the Salāt), and their merits and their Rewards

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/94)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/94)
text: كَانَ طُولُ حَائِطِ مَسْجِدِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) قَامَةً فَكَانَ يَقُولُ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لِبِلَالٍ إِذَا دَخَلَ الْوَقْتُ يَا بِلَالُ اعْلُ فَوْقَ الْجِدَارِ وَ ارْفَعْ صَوْتَكَ بِالْأَذَانِ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ قَدْ وَكَّلَ بِالْأَذَانِ رِيحاً تَرْفَعُهُ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ وَ إِنَّ الْمَلَائِكَةَ إِذَا سَمِعُوا الْأَذَانَ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْأَرْضِ قَالُوا هَذِهِ أَصْوَاتُ أُمَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بِتَوْحِيدِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ لِأُمَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) حَتَّى يَفْرُغُوا مِنْ تِلْكَ الصَّلَاةِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammd, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The height of the wall of Masjid of Rasool-Allahsaww was of one stature. So hesaww was saying to Bilal: ‘When the time comes, O Bilal, climb above the wall and raise your voice with the Azān, for Allahazwj has Allocated a wind with the Azān raising it to the sky, and that the Angels, when they are hearing the Azān from the inhabitants of the earth, they are saying: ‘Voices of the community of Muhammadsaww (affirming) the Oneness of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic’, and they are seeking Forgiveness for the community of Muhammadsaww until they are free from that Salāt’.
en.sarwar: 31. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from ibn Mahbub from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the height of the wall of the Masjid of the Messenger of Allah was equal to the height of a man. He, the Messenger of Allah would say to Bilal, ‘When time comes, O Bilal, climb on the wall and raise your voice with Adhan. Allah has assigned a wind to raise Adhan to the heaven and that the angels upon hearing Adhan from the people of earth say, “This is the voice of the followers of Prophet Muhammad about oneness of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious.” They ask forgiveness for the followers of Muhammad, O Allah grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, until they complete that prayer.’”
